financial_health.findings: Revenue declined 15% YoY. Credit rating downgraded from A to BBB by Moody's in January 2026. Debt-to-equity ratio increased to 2.8x.

legal_regulatory.findings: Pending SEC investigation into accounting practices. Class action lawsuit filed by shareholders in Q4 2025.

cybersecurity.findings: SOC 2 Type II certified. No known breaches in past 24 months. Regular penetration testing disclosed.

leadership_governance.findings: CFO departure in November 2025 with successor appointed. Board composition stable.

esg_reputation.findings: No significant environmental or labor issues. ESG rating maintained at B+.

adverse_events.title: Moody's Credit Downgrade
adverse_events.description: Moody's downgraded Acme Corp from A to BBB citing deteriorating cash flow and rising debt levels.

adverse_events.title: SEC Investigation Disclosed
adverse_events.description: SEC opened formal investigation into revenue recognition practices following whistleblower complaint.
